Create a clean U.S. presence map, then export it for any graphic.

Build the map. Export the graphic.

Add locations by city, community, or military installation; edit the design; and export a high-resolution PNG or scalable SVG. Everything runs in this browser.

Tip: choose a listed city, community, or military installation for accurate placement. Installation records are available as location anchors and are not all drawn automatically. SVG is best for editing; PNG is best for slides and graphics.
